name: NextJs Application - Dictionary
description: Developed using Next.js and React.js, acting as an interactive dictionary for informal expressions./Employed SCSS for a modern UI design with a Dark Mode feature, enhancing user experience./Utilized Supabase for efficient backend operations including user authentication and database management./Enabled registered users to contribute by adding expressions and interacting via a like-dislike system.

name: NextJs Application - To-do List
description: Developed using Next.js and React.js, acting as a todo list for users./Employed SCSS for a modern UI design./Integrated a user-friendly ’Dark Mode’ toggle for a more comfortable viewing experience./Utilized Supabase for efficient backend operations including user authentication and database management.

name: NextJs Application - Blog
description: Developed using Next.js and React.js, paired with TypeScript, acting as a frontend for a wordpress blog./Employed SCSS for a modern UI design./Integrated a user-friendly ’Dark Mode’ toggle for a more comfortable viewing experience./Utilized Graphql to get the data from the wordpress blog.
